evals.name: extract-and-create-report
evals.prompt: hey, i've got a quarterly report pdf at ./test-data/quarterly-report.pdf — need to pull out all the text as json (save to extracted-text.json), grab the tables from the first 3 pages (save to tables.json), and also generate a new pdf from ./test-data/summary.md in A4 size (summary-report.pdf). can you show me what the json looks like from each step?
evals.expected_output: The agent should use extract-text.ts with --format json, extract-tables.ts with --pages 1-3, and create-pdf.ts with --from-markdown and --page-size a4. All outputs should be structured JSON summaries.

assertions.description: Agent uses the extract-text.ts script for text extraction
Agent uses JSON format flag for structured output
Agent uses the extract-tables.ts script for table extraction
Agent specifies page range for table extraction
Agent uses the create-pdf.ts script for PDF creation
Agent uses markdown input mode for PDF creation
Agent sets A4 page size as requested
Agent runs scripts with bun runtime

evals.name: merge-split-workflow
evals.prompt: I have three PDF chapters: ./chapters/ch1.pdf (10 pages), ./chapters/ch2.pdf (8 pages), and ./chapters/ch3.pdf (12 pages). I need to: (1) merge them into a single book.pdf, including only pages 1-5 from chapter 1, all of chapter 2, and pages 3-10 from chapter 3, (2) then split the merged result into 5-page chunks in a directory called ./book-chunks/. Use the pdf-toolkit scripts for both operations.
evals.expected_output: The agent should use merge-pdf.ts with --page-ranges using semicolons to separate per-input ranges, then split-pdf.ts with --mode chunks --chunk-size 5. Both should produce JSON summaries.

assertions.description: Agent uses the merge-pdf.ts script for merging
Agent specifies output path for merged PDF (required flag)
Agent uses page-ranges flag for selective merging
Agent specifies correct page ranges: 1-5 for ch1, all for ch2, 3-10 for ch3
Agent uses the split-pdf.ts script for splitting
Agent uses chunks mode for splitting
Agent sets chunk size to 5 pages
Agent specifies output directory for split files using the skill's --output-dir flag

evals.name: scanned-pdf-ocr-extraction
evals.prompt: I have a scanned PDF document at ./scans/old-contract.pdf. The text isn't selectable because it's a scan. I need to: (1) try extracting text first to confirm it's a scan, (2) then OCR the document to get the text content with confidence scores in JSON format, (3) also extract any images from the document and save them as JPEG files in ./contract-images/. Use 600 DPI for the OCR to get better accuracy since the scan quality might be poor.
evals.expected_output: The agent should first try extract-text.ts, recognize it returns empty/garbled text, then use ocr-pdf.ts with --format json --dpi 600, and extract-images.ts with --format jpeg --output-dir ./contract-images/.

assertions.description: Agent tries extract-text.ts first before OCR (text-before-OCR principle)
Agent uses ocr-pdf.ts for the scanned document
Agent sets DPI to 600 as requested for better accuracy
Agent uses JSON format for structured OCR output with confidence scores
Agent uses extract-images.ts for image extraction
Agent extracts images as JPEG format
Agent specifies output directory for extracted images
Agent mentions or references confidence scores from OCR output
